title: Datadog vs GitLab
description: Compare Datadog vs GitLab in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right developer tools tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Datadog emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.6/5 rating compared to 4.5/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Datadog or GitLab?

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Datadog and GitLab?
faqs.answer: Datadog and GitLab differ in pricing ($15/host/mo vs Free – $29/mo per user), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Datadog cheaper than GitLab?
faqs.answer: Datadog starts at $15/host/mo while GitLab starts at Free – $29/mo per user. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Datadog or GitLab?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for developer tools. Datadog scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Datadog and GitLab together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Datadog or GitLab?
faqs.answer: Both Datadog and GitLab prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which developer tools tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor GitLab for large teams, while Datadog may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $15/host/mo pricing.
